name: Russian Beet & Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Mix well to ensure even distribution of flavors and textures.
3. Cover the mixture with plastic wrap or transfer it to an airtight container.
4. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld together.
5. Serve chilled on a bed of lettuce or cabbage leaves.
